# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-payment-api
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.stripe.com
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-payment-api
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.stripe.com
  tls:
  - match:
    - port: 443
      sniHosts:
      - api.stripe.com
    route:
    - destination:
        host: api.stripe.com
        port:
          number: 443
      weight: 100

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-postgres-db
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - postgres.external.example.com
  addresses:
  - 10.20.30.40/32
  ports:
  - number: 5432
    name: tcp-postgres
    protocol: TCP
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: STATIC
  endpoints:
  - address: 10.20.30.40

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-postgres-db
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - postgres.external.example.com
  tcp:
  - match:
    - port: 5432
    route:
    - destination:
        host: postgres.external.example.com
        port:
          number: 5432

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-mysql-db
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - mysql.rds.amazonaws.com
  ports:
  - number: 3306
    name: tcp-mysql
    protocol: TCP
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-mysql-db
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - mysql.rds.amazonaws.com
  tcp:
  - match:
    - port: 3306
    route:
    - destination:
        host: mysql.rds.amazonaws.com
        port:
          number: 3306

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-analytics-api
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.segment.io
  - cdn.segment.com
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-analytics-api
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.segment.io
  - cdn.segment.com
  tls:
  - match:
    - port: 443
      sniHosts:
      - api.segment.io
      - cdn.segment.com
    route:
    - destination:
        host: api.segment.io
        port:
          number: 443
      weight: 100

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-monitoring-api
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.datadoghq.com
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-monitoring-api
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.datadoghq.com
  http:
  - match:
    - port: 443
    route:
    - destination:
        host: api.datadoghq.com
        port:
          number: 443
    timeout: 30s
    retries:
      attempts: 3
      perTryTimeout: 10s

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-s3-storage
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - "*.s3.amazonaws.com"
  - s3.amazonaws.com
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-s3-storage
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - "*.s3.amazonaws.com"
  - s3.amazonaws.com
  tls:
  - match:
    - port: 443
      sniHosts:
      - "*.s3.amazonaws.com"
      - s3.amazonaws.com
    route:
    - destination:
        host: s3.amazonaws.com
        port:
          number: 443

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-redis-cache
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - redis.elasticache.amazonaws.com
  addresses:
  - 10.50.60.70/32
  ports:
  - number: 6379
    name: tcp-redis
    protocol: TCP
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: STATIC
  endpoints:
  - address: 10.50.60.70

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-redis-cache
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - redis.elasticache.amazonaws.com
  tcp:
  - match:
    - port: 6379
    route:
    - destination:
        host: redis.elasticache.amazonaws.com
        port:
          number: 6379

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-auth-provider
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - auth0.com
  - "*.auth0.com"
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-auth-provider
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - auth0.com
  - "*.auth0.com"
  http:
  - match:
    - port: 443
    route:
    - destination:
        host: auth0.com
        port:
          number: 443
    timeout: 15s

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-email-service
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.sendgrid.com
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-email-service
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.sendgrid.com
  http:
  - match:
    - port: 443
    route:
    - destination:
        host: api.sendgrid.com
        port:
          number: 443
    retries:
      attempts: 3
      perTryTimeout: 5s
      retryOn: 5xx,reset,connect-failure,refused-stream

---

  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS

  resolution: DNS

metadata:
  name: external-sms-service
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.twilio.com
  http:
  - match:
    - port: 443
    route:
    - destination:
        host: api.twilio.com
        port:
          number: 443
    timeout: 10s

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-elasticsearch
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - elasticsearch.external.example.com
  addresses:
  - 10.80.90.100/32
  ports:
  - number: 9200
    name: http-elasticsearch
    protocol: HTTP
  - number: 9300
    name: tcp-elasticsearch
    protocol: TCP
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: STATIC
  endpoints:
  - address: 10.80.90.100

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-elasticsearch
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - elasticsearch.external.example.com
  http:
  - match:
    - port: 9200
    route:
    - destination:
        host: elasticsearch.external.example.com
        port:
          number: 9200
    timeout: 30s

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-kafka-cluster
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - kafka-broker-1.external.example.com
  - kafka-broker-2.external.example.com
  - kafka-broker-3.external.example.com
  addresses:
  - 10.110.120.130/32
  - 10.110.120.131/32
  - 10.110.120.132/32
  ports:
  - number: 9092
    name: tcp-kafka
    protocol: TCP
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: STATIC
  endpoints:
  - address: 10.110.120.130
  - address: 10.110.120.131
  - address: 10.110.120.132

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-kafka-cluster
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - kafka-broker-1.external.example.com
  - kafka-broker-2.external.example.com
  - kafka-broker-3.external.example.com
  tcp:
  - match:
    - port: 9092
    route:
    - destination:
        host: kafka-broker-1.external.example.com
        port:
          number: 9092
      weight: 33
    - destination:
        host: kafka-broker-2.external.example.com
        port:
          number: 9092
      weight: 33
    - destination:
        host: kafka-broker-3.external.example.com
        port:
          number: 9092
      weight: 34

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-github-api
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.github.com
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-github-api
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.github.com
  http:
  - match:
    - port: 443
    route:
    - destination:
        host: api.github.com
        port:
          number: 443
    timeout: 20s
    retries:
      attempts: 2
      perTryTimeout: 10s

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-google-apis
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - "*.googleapis.com"
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-google-apis
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - "*.googleapis.com"
  tls:
  - match:
    - port: 443
      sniHosts:
      - "*.googleapis.com"
    route:
    - destination:
        host: googleapis.com
        port:
          number: 443

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-mongodb-atlas
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - cluster0.mongodb.net
  ports:
  - number: 27017
    name: tcp-mongo
    protocol: MONGO
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-mongodb-atlas
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - cluster0.mongodb.net
  tcp:
  - match:
    - port: 27017
    route:
    - destination:
        host: cluster0.mongodb.net
        port:
          number: 27017

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-slack-api
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - slack.com
  - hooks.slack.com
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-slack-api
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - slack.com
  - hooks.slack.com
  http:
  - match:
    - port: 443
    route:
    - destination:
        host: slack.com
        port:
          number: 443
    timeout: 10s

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-graphql-api
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - graphql.external-partner.com
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-graphql-api
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - graphql.external-partner.com
  http:
  - match:
    - port: 443
      headers:
        content-type:
          exact: application/json
    route:
    - destination:
        host: graphql.external-partner.com
        port:
          number: 443
    timeout: 25s
    retries:
      attempts: 2
      perTryTimeout: 12s

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-ldap-server
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - ldap.corporate.example.com
  addresses:
  - 10.200.210.220/32
  ports:
  - number: 389
    name: tcp-ldap
    protocol: TCP
  - number: 636
    name: tcp-ldaps
    protocol: TCP
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: STATIC
  endpoints:
  - address: 10.200.210.220

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-ldap-server
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - ldap.corporate.example.com
  tcp:
  - match:
    - port: 636
    route:
    - destination:
        host: ldap.corporate.example.com
        port:
          number: 636

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-cdn-cloudfront
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - "*.cloudfront.net"
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-cdn-cloudfront
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - "*.cloudfront.net"
  tls:
  - match:
    - port: 443
      sniHosts:
      - "*.cloudfront.net"
    route:
    - destination:
        host: cloudfront.net
        port:
          number: 443

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-vault-secrets
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - vault.hashicorp.example.com
  ports:
  - number: 8200
    name: https-vault
    protocol: HTTPS
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-vault-secrets
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - vault.hashicorp.example.com
  http:
  - match:
    - port: 8200
    route:
    - destination:
        host: vault.hashicorp.example.com
        port:
          number: 8200
    timeout: 15s
